ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "st_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the student joined the institution */,
  " dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Parent's email address */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Parent's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("st_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "teacher_phone" TEXT /* Teacher's phone number */,
  "teacher_qualifications" TEXT /* Teacher's qualifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that offers the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of examination (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("st_id") REFERENCES students ("st_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the feedback */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., academic, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("st_id") REFERENCES students ("st_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support instance */,
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving support */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject for which support is provided */,
  "support_details" TEXT /* Details of the support provided */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the support was provided */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support (e.g., tutoring, mentoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("st_id") REFERENCES students ("st_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the class in the subject */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_progress_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_progress_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "login_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "attendance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("st_id") REFERENCES students ("st_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guardians" (
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guardian */,
  "st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the guardian */,
  "guardian_email" TEXT /* Guardian's email address */,
  "guardian_phone" TEXT /* Guardian's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guardian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guardians_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("st_id") REFERENCES students ("st_id")
)
